steps.assistant_text: List-unlink leaf (walk head a3 for node a1, store a1->next into predecessor slot *a2) — an -O1 -g3 ISLAND inside the -O2 post1b TU (3 signatures: plain bne+nop, un-copy-propagated move a2,a3;lw a3,0(a2), empty 8-byte frame). Recipe: unused 'int pad;' = the frame bracket; NOVEL zero-emission lever 'if (0) a0_unused = 0;' dead overwrite kills IDO -O1's unused-arg home store (sw a0,8(sp)) without emitting anything; -g3 pins the prologue addiu ahead of the beq. Landed via REPLACE_FUNC_BODY donor splice (asm-processor rejects -O1 -g3, so direct-CC rule; donor has no GLOBAL_ASM). DISCOVERY: whole 0x6A09C-0x6BAD4 span is an -O1 island (zero branch-likely) — 6AF44/6A304/6A420/6B974/6B7A0/6B880/6BAD4 etc. are re-probe candidates; their 'stack-residency cap' notes assumed -O2.

metadata.verification: 14/14 word-exact (final ROM bytes at 0xE4FFE4) + make ROM byte-identical
